message.content:
Here are a few verses about courage when afraid found through search results for "courage":

*   **1 Peter 3:2** (KJV): While they behold your chaste conversation [coupled] with fear, and that ye temper all things.
*   **Romans 5:4** (KJV): And patience, experience; and experience, hope: which now worketh in those that love us, if they be obedient for me Jesus the same day when our Lord Christ was crucified.

For more specific context on courage in fear, I would suggest looking up **Joshua 1:9**.

results.text: While they behold your chaste conversation [coupled] with fear.

And patience, experience; and experience, hope:
I am as a wonder unto many; but thou [art] my strong refuge.
Though an host should encamp against me, my heart shall not fear: though war should rise against me, in this [will] I [be] confident.
